prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约19970→18893→19158→13763→约14000名，2024年因专业组调整（改为物理、化学必选的数据科学与大数据技术）位次大幅前移约5395名，2025年基准约14000名；2021年计划6人，2022–2024年均为2人。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021年约第135名→2026年约第85名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与知名度增强；2026年声誉偏负面，主要因招聘公告中要求配偶为在职博士引发舆论争议，学校已终止招聘并致歉，对报考心理有一定负面影响；抖音关注度一般（总排名第76），未见明显投档断档记录；植物保护A-为唯一A-及以上学科，与该校农林特色一致，但上海市招生专业以数据科学与大数据技术为主，与优势学科关联度不高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 数据科学与大数据技术属计算机类大类，社会热度高热推荐，对考生吸引力强；本省2026年考生总数约66700人，较2025年约49276人增长约35.4%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2024年因专业调整大幅前移后趋于稳定、2026年招生计划持平、学校软科排名持续上升（正面信号）与上海考生数大幅增长约35.4%（竞争加剧信号）相互对冲，以及声誉偏负面（轻微负面影响），在2025年基准约14000名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约14200名，区间13700–14700名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数据科学与大数据技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、物联网工程、信息安全、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 财政学类（含财政学、金融学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 法学

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间13700–14700名内，建议以二档专业为主、一档数据科学与大数据技术冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<13700名）可重点冲刺数据科学与大数据技术；位次接近区间上限（>14700名）建议以三档专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 19970 → 18893 → 19158 → 13763 → about 14000. In 2024, due to adjustments in major groups (changed to Data Science and Big Data Technology requiring Physics and Chemistry), the ranking significantly moved forward by about 5395 places. The 2025 baseline is about 14000. The enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, and 2 from 2022 to 2024.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been rising continuously, from about 135th in 2021 to about 85th in 2026. In recent years, the ranking has steadily improved, enhancing the university's overall strength and visibility. In 2026, the reputation is slightly negative, mainly due to a recruitment announcement requiring the spouse to be a current doctoral student, which sparked public controversy. The university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, which has a certain negative impact on application psychology. Douyin attention is average (overall ranking 76), with no obvious enrollment gaps. Plant Protection A- is the only A- or above discipline, consistent with the university's agricultural and forestry characteristics, but the enrollment majors in Shanghai are mainly Data Science and Big Data Technology, which are not highly related to the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the broader Computer category, which is highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to about 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings that significantly moved forward in 2024 due to major adjustments and then stabilized, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (positive signal), and the substantial increase of about 35.4% in Shanghai candidates (competition intensification signal) offsetting each other, along with the slightly negative reputation (minor negative impact), competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of about 14,000. The predicted minimum ranking is about 14,200, with a range of 13,700 to 14,700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Finance and Taxation Category (including Finance, Financial Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Economics and Trade Category (including Economics, International Economics and Trade)
- Law
- English.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13,700 to 14,700, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 Data Science and Big Data Technology as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<13,700), you can focus on aiming for Data Science and Big Data Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>14,700), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors.
